claim_contract.name: cudaDeviceProp/cudaDeviceGetAttribute inventory
claim_contract.negative_guard: No CUDA/Jetson hardware mechanism claim may be made if device_count is zero or the property is absent.

claim_contract.name: pinned host allocation via cudaHostAlloc
claim_contract.negative_guard: Do not claim pinned-memory benefit or zero-copy unless a production mounted-path benchmark uses this path.

claim_contract.name: registered host memory via cudaHostRegister
claim_contract.negative_guard: Do not claim registered host memory for production I/O unless the mounted path records this allocation mode.

claim_contract.name: managed memory / UVM allocation
claim_contract.negative_guard: Do not claim direct storage-to-UVM DMA or production UVM benefit from allocation-only evidence.

claim_contract.name: pageable memory access
claim_contract.negative_guard: Do not claim coherent pageable GPU access unless the probe passes and the mounted path uses pageable memory intentionally.

evidence: no CUDA dma-buf export/import production probe is implemented
claim_contract.name: dma-buf export/import
claim_contract.negative_guard: dma-buf zero-copy remains a non-claim until CUDA allocation export/import and mounted-path use are proven.

claim_contract.name: GPUDirect/RDMA applicability
claim_contract.negative_guard: GPUDirect/RDMA and direct NVMe-to-UVM DMA remain non-claims without driver, peer-memory, RDMA/NVMe, and production mounted-path evidence.

claim_contract.name: NVMe-to-UVM direct DMA
claim_contract.negative_guard: The paper must not claim direct NVMe-to-UVM DMA.

negative_claim_guard: No paper or README text may claim direct NVMe-to-UVM DMA, GPUDirect/RDMA, dma-buf zero-copy, pageable-memory coherency, UVM production benefit, or pinned/registered host-memory benefit unless this contract reports paper_mechanism_eligible=true for that mechanism and a later production mounted-path artifact uses it.

official_basis.name: NVIDIA CUDA for Tegra memory/coherency guidance
used_for: host registration and pageable memory caution

l4t_version_files./etc/nv_boot_control.conf:

TEGRA_CHIPID 0x26

TEGRA_OTA_GPT_DEVICE /dev/mtdblock0
